name: BB:FalsePositive: SNMP Sender or Receiver False Positive Categories
notes: Edit this BB to define all the false positive categories that occur to or from SNMP senders or receivers that are defined in the BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver building block.
bb_references: BB:FalsePositive: SNMP Sender or Receiver False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver
where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Recon, Suspicious
TD_list: APPLY BB:FalsePositive: SNMP Sender or Receiver False Positive Categories on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND when we see an event match any of the following BB:HostDefinition: SNMP Sender or Receiver
AND where the Event Category for the event is one of the following Recon, Suspicious
